cause_hypothesis: Drift detector flagged browser exploration (read_page, type attempts) as non-productive because the metrics track tool diversity not semantic progress. Multiple failed typing attempts on contenteditable ProseMirror looked like repeated failures.
lesson: When interacting with ChatGPT browser, skip typing tools and go directly to page.evaluate DOM injection. Also: the drift detector does not understand browser-based workflows — this is a known limitation of proxy metrics.

cause_hypothesis: Polling browser for GPT completion (4x 30-45s waits) counted as non-productive rounds, triggering drift detector. The metrics window filled with poll rounds that had no tool call diversity.
lesson: When polling GPT browser completion, each wait round degrades drift metrics. Accept this as a known limitation. Alternatively: do parallel useful work during wait (update files, memory, ledger) instead of pure polling.
